meaning: cake<英>葡萄干馅饼(原产于英国兰开夏郡埃克尔斯镇的一种花式饼)
examples: Professor Eccles whose findings are published in today's issue of Family Practice magazine.
Even Dr Eccles agrees: "in England we have a paternalistic approach akin to a parent-child relationship."
Eccles believes that her company will continue to expand its user base and payouts.
In the mid-1980s Aunt Mary married Viscount Eccles, who shared her intellectual and artistic passions.
One fruitful offshoot: They established the Eccles Centre for American Studies at the British Library.
